priority_tiers.P0_critical: Brand-breaking issues — fix first, affects every screen
priority_tiers.P1_high: Missing tokens & architecture gaps — fix before new features
priority_tiers.P2_medium: Hardcoded values & partial implementations — systematic cleanup

tasks.title: Brand primary color mismatch — #00c3f7 should be #05AEDB
tasks.description: Figma Brand/60 is #05AEDB (the primary CTA/links/active color). Code brand.primary is #00c3f7 which is azul aust (an accent/gradient color, NOT the primary). Every branded element renders the wrong blue.
tasks.action: Replace '#00c3f7' with '#05AEDB' on line 43. Keep brandPalette[300] as '#00c3f7' (that IS azul aust correctly).

tasks.title: Missing Gray/80 (#1F2937) — Figma's primary text color
tasks.description: Figma uses Gray/80 (#1F2937) as the primary text/heading color. Code stops at gray.70 (#334155). This affects all headings and body text darkness.
tasks.action: Add '80: "#1F2937"' after line 138 (after gray.70). Also add deprecated alias gray900: '#1F2937' in neutral block (line 173) pointing to gray[80].

tasks.title: Integrate strangeicons library — 37 hardcoded SVGs vs 5800+ specified in Figma
tasks.description: Figma specifies strangeicons (strangehelix.bio) with 111+ health/biology icons cataloged and 5800+ total. Code has 37 hand-drawn SVG path icons in Icon.tsx. The icon system must be replaced with strangeicons.
tasks.current_value: 37 hardcoded SVG path icons in iconPaths object
tasks.action: 1) Install strangeicons package (check npm/GitHub for @strangehelix/icons or similar). 2) Replace iconPaths with strangeicons imports. 3) Update Icon component to render strangeicons SVGs. 4) Keep IconContainer wrapper for sizing/color. 5) Map old icon names to new strangeicons names for backward compat.

sub_tasks.action: Research and install strangeicons npm package
Create icon name mapping: old 37 names -> strangeicons equivalents
Refactor Icon.tsx to import from strangeicons instead of hardcoded paths
Add Icon Container component with Size×Color×Style variant props matching Figma (6 sizes × 5 colors × 4 styles = 120 variants)

tasks.title: Missing Heading xl/Bold — 60px font size
tasks.description: Figma defines Heading xl/Bold at 60px/68px line-height/-1.8px letter-spacing. Code max is display-lg at 48px. Page titles render 12px too small.
tasks.action: Add 'display-xl': '60px' before display-lg in fontSize. Add h0: '60px' in heading. Add lineHeight.display: 1.133 and letterSpacing.display: '-0.03em'.

tasks.title: Typography line-height mismatch — code uses 1.5 where Figma uses 1.375
tasks.description: Text md: Figma line-height is 22px/16px = 1.375, code uses 1.5 (base). Text lg: Figma is 24px/18px = 1.333, code uses 1.5. This affects all body text vertical rhythm.
tasks.action: Add granular line-height tokens: lineHeight.body = 1.375 (for 14-16px text), lineHeight.bodyLg = 1.333 (for 18-20px text). Keep lineHeight.base = 1.5 as fallback for backward compat.

tasks.title: Typography letter-spacing mismatch — code -0.025em vs Figma -0.044em
tasks.description: Figma Text md has -0.7px/-0.044em letter-spacing, Text lg has -0.8px/-0.044em. Code has only letterSpacing.tight = -0.025em. Text appears looser than design.
tasks.figma_token: Text md letterSpacing, Text lg letterSpacing
tasks.action: Replace letterSpacing.tight from '-0.025em' to '-0.044em'. Add letterSpacing.tighter = '-0.03em' for display/heading sizes.

tasks.title: Button variant architecture divergence — journey-based vs Figma explicit props
tasks.description: Figma Button has Color(Brand/Destructive/Gray/Success) × Hierarchy(Primary/Secondary/NoFill) × Size(2xl-sm=11 sizes) × State(6 states) × IsMobile = 576+ variants. Code Button has 3 sizes × 3 hierarchies × 1 state (disabled) = 9 variants.
tasks.canonical_value: 11 sizes (2xl-sm), 4 colors (Brand/Destructive/Gray/Success), 3 hierarchies, 6 states (Default/Disabled/Focused/Hovered/Pressed/Loading), isMobile flag
tasks.action: 1) Add 'color' prop with values: 'brand'|'destructive'|'gray'|'success'. 2) Add sizes: '2xl'|'xl' and 'xs'|'2xs' etc. 3) Add states: focused, hovered, pressed, loading. 4) Add isMobile responsive prop. Keep journey-based aliases as convenience wrappers.

sub_tasks.action: Add missing sizes: 2xl, xl, xs, 2xs (matching Figma scale)
Add focused, hovered, pressed, loading states with correct visual styles per Figma

tasks.title: FileUploader.tsx — 10 hardcoded hex colors
tasks.description: FileUploader has journey colors and UI colors hardcoded instead of using design tokens.
tasks.action: Import colors from design tokens and replace all 10 hardcoded hex values with token references.

tasks.title: Leaderboard.styles.ts — 9 hardcoded hex colors
tasks.description: Gamification leaderboard uses hardcoded medal colors and UI colors.
tasks.action: 1) Add gamification medal tokens to colors.ts (gold/silver/bronze + bg variants). 2) Replace all 9 hardcoded values in Leaderboard.styles.ts.

tasks.title: EmptyState.tsx — 4 hardcoded journey colors
tasks.description: EmptyState repeats the same journey color switch pattern as FileUploader.
tasks.action: Import colors from design tokens and replace hardcoded journey switch with token references.

tasks.title: JourneyHeader.tsx — 3 hardcoded #FFFFFF
tasks.description: JourneyHeader uses hardcoded white instead of colors.gray[0].
tasks.action: Import colors and replace '#FFFFFF' with colors.gray[0].

tasks.title: Toast.styles.ts — 4 hardcoded background colors
tasks.description: Toast uses hardcoded lighter semantic bg colors instead of token equivalents.

violations.replace_with: Add colors.semantic.infoBg token, then reference it

tasks.action: Replace hardcoded bg colors with semantic tokens. Note: Toast success bg (#E6F7ED) differs from colors.semantic.successBg (#f0fdf4) — verify with Figma which is canonical, then align both.

tasks.title: VideoConsultation.styles.ts — 2 hardcoded colors
tasks.description: Video consultation styles use hardcoded colors.
tasks.action: Read file, identify hardcoded colors, replace with appropriate tokens from colors.ts.

tasks.title: Missing Toggle/Switch component
tasks.description: Figma Form Controls includes Toggle. Code has Checkbox and RadioButton but no Toggle.
tasks.canonical_value: Toggle component with on/off states, sizes, disabled state
tasks.action: Create Toggle component in src/web/design-system/src/components/Toggle/ with Toggle.tsx, Toggle.styles.ts, Toggle.test.tsx, index.ts.

tasks.title: Missing standalone Alert component
tasks.description: Figma has Alert & Notification as separate from Toast. Code only has Toast.
tasks.action: Create Alert component in src/web/design-system/src/components/Alert/ — an inline, persistent notification banner distinct from Toast overlay.

tasks.title: Badge missing Figma variant props — 94 variants vs ~5 implemented
tasks.description: Figma Badge has Status × Size(lg/md/sm) × Type(Dot/Icon/Text) = 94 variants. Code Badge is achievement-focused with limited status variants.
tasks.action: Add props: size('lg'|'md'|'sm'), type('dot'|'icon'|'text'), status with full Figma status enum.

tasks.title: Input missing Passcode and Slider variants
tasks.description: Figma Input includes _InputPasscodeBase (4/6 digits) and _InputSliderDot/_InputSliderRange. Code only has text input.
tasks.canonical_value: Text input + Passcode (4/6 digits) + Slider input variants
tasks.action: Add PasscodeInput sub-component with digits prop (4|6). Slider input may be covered by existing Slider component — verify and cross-reference.

tasks.title: Tabs missing orientation and style variants
tasks.description: Figma Tabs have Orientation(Horizontal/Vertical) × Size × Style(BottomBorder/Default/LeftBorder) = 24 variants. Code has basic horizontal tabs only.
tasks.action: Add orientation and style props to Tabs component. Create vertical layout variant and left-border style.

tasks.title: Tooltip missing color variants
tasks.description: Figma Tooltip has Arrow × Color(Black/Brand/White) = 27 variants. Code has hardcoded dark theme only.
tasks.action: Add color prop to Tooltip: 'black' (current default), 'brand' (#05AEDB bg), 'white' (light bg, dark text).

tasks.title: ProgressBar missing Figma progression variants (108 total)
tasks.description: Figma has 108 progression variants with Size and Label position props. Code has basic ProgressBar + ProgressCircle.
tasks.action: Add size and labelPosition props to ProgressBar. labelPosition: 'above'|'below'|'inline'|'none'.

tasks.title: ChatMessage missing AI immersive variants
tasks.description: Figma has AI Assistant, AI Companion, and Text Input AI Immersive chat components. Code has basic ChatMessage only.
tasks.canonical_value: AI Assistant variant + AI Companion variant + AI Immersive text input
tasks.action: Add variant prop: 'user'|'ai-assistant'|'ai-companion'. Add AIImmersiveInput sub-component for the AI chat input bar.

tasks.title: 83.6% of interactive mobile components missing accessibilityLabel
tasks.description: Of ~2493 interactive components (Pressable/TouchableOpacity/Button) in mobile src, only ~1097 have accessibilityLabel or aria-label. 56% coverage, 44% missing.
tasks.canonical_value: 100% of interactive elements must have accessibilityLabel
tasks.action: Systematically audit all .tsx files under src/web/mobile/src for Pressable, TouchableOpacity, and Button without accessibilityLabel. Add descriptive labels. Priority files: screens with forms, navigation, and action buttons.

sub_tasks.action: Grep for Pressable/TouchableOpacity without accessibilityLabel in the same component
Add accessibilityLabel to all interactive elements in screen files
Add accessibilityLabel to all interactive elements in shared components

tasks.title: Icon component defaults aria-hidden=true — icons used as actions need labels
tasks.description: Icon.tsx defaults aria-hidden to true. When icons are used as standalone action buttons (e.g., close, back arrow), they become invisible to screen readers.
tasks.canonical_value: aria-hidden should be false when icon is interactive, with required aria-label
tasks.action: Audit all Icon usages inside Pressable/Button wrappers. Ensure aria-hidden='false' and aria-label is provided for interactive icons. Consider adding a variant prop 'interactive' that flips the default.

tasks.title: Missing semantic.infoBg token
tasks.description: colors.semantic has successBg, warningBg, errorBg but no infoBg. Toast.styles.ts hardcodes #E6F0FA for info background.
tasks.action: Add infoBg: '#eff6ff' after errorBg in semantic block (line ~114). This aligns with the blue-tinted pattern of the other semantic backgrounds.

tasks.title: Missing effects/elevation tokens
tasks.description: Figma defines Effects (Shadow, Blur, Focus) with elevation levels for cards, modals, dropdowns, and focus rings. Code has no elevation/shadow token file.
tasks.canonical_value: Elevation levels: sm (card), md (dropdown), lg (modal), focus ring styles
tasks.action: Create src/web/design-system/src/tokens/effects.ts with elevation/shadow tokens matching Figma Effects frame. Export boxShadow scale and focusRing styles.

tasks.title: Missing gamification medal color tokens
tasks.description: Leaderboard uses hardcoded gold/silver/bronze colors. These should be formalized as design tokens.
tasks.canonical_value: Add gold, silver, bronze, and their bg/text variants
tasks.action: Extend colors.gamification with: gold: '#FFD700', goldBg: '#FFF6DE', goldText: '#D9A600', silver: '#C0C0C0', silverBg: '#F5F5F5', silverText: '#808080', bronze: '#CD7F32', bronzeBg: '#FFF0E6', bronzeText: '#A05A2C'.

tasks.title: Missing Arrow/Keyboard helper components
tasks.description: Figma Misc & Helper section has Arrow (27 direction×color variants) and Key/Keyboard components. Code only has Divider.
tasks.action: Create Arrow primitive with direction and color props. Low priority — only needed if UI requires directional indicators.

tasks.title: Breadcrumb missing divider type variants
tasks.description: Figma Breadcrumb has Divider Type(Colon/Icon/Slash). Code likely defaults to one divider type.
tasks.action: Add dividerType prop to Breadcrumb component.

tasks.title: Zero illustration assets in codebase — all Figma screens use placeholder boxes/emojis
tasks.description: Figma has 20+ screen sections with professionally designed custom illustrations (error states, onboarding, empty states, splash, transitions). The codebase has ZERO image assets — every screen uses colored boxes, emoji, or plain text as placeholders. This is a fundamental visual fidelity gap affecting the entire user experience.
tasks.current_value: IllustrationPlaceholder (gray box), IllustrationEmoji (emoji), IllustrationBox (colored box), plain SVG circle icons
tasks.canonical_value: Custom vector illustrations from Figma for each screen context
tasks.action: Use Figma download_figma_images tool to export illustration nodes as SVG (preferred) or PNG@3x. Create assets/illustrations directory. Each screen section needs its illustrations extracted individually by node ID.

illustrations_needed.name: error-404-not-found
illustrations_needed.description: Person with magnifying glass searching (Não encontrado)

illustrations_needed.name: error-401-server
illustrations_needed.description: Person tripping with question marks (Erro do servidor)

illustrations_needed.name: error-no-internet
illustrations_needed.description: Phone with WiFi symbol disconnected (Sem Internet)

illustrations_needed.name: error-maintenance
illustrations_needed.description: Worker with STOP sign and megaphone (Manutenção)

screen_sections.current_implementation: 404.tsx: plain text '404'. 500.tsx: inline SVG circle icon. No illustrations whatsoever.
IllustrationPlaceholder (gray 200px box), IllustrationBox (colored View), IllustrationEmoji (emoji character). All fake.
ProfileBiometricSetup uses IllustrationContainer with emoji as placeholder.

execution_workflow.step_1: Wait for Figma API rate limit to reset (typically 1-2 hours)
execution_workflow.step_2: For each screen section, use get_figma_data with the frame_id at depth 3-4 to find the illustration child nodes
execution_workflow.step_3: Use download_figma_images to export each illustration node as SVG (or PNG@3x for raster art)
execution_workflow.step_5: Create an illustration registry (index.ts) that exports all illustrations by name
execution_workflow.step_6: Update each screen component to import and render the real illustration instead of the placeholder
execution_workflow.note: This pipeline REQUIRES Figma MCP access — it can only run here in Cowork, not in VS Code. The screen component updates (step 6) CAN be delegated to Claude Code agents in VS Code after the exports are done.

tasks.title: Unify color variant system — journey-based + Figma semantic colors
tasks.description: Figma uses Color(Brand/Destructive/Gray/Success/Warning) across all components. Code uses journey-based (health/care/plan). These need to coexist: Figma semantic colors for component variants, journey colors for page theming.
tasks.canonical_value: Dual system: Figma semantic (Brand/Destructive/Gray/Success/Warning) for component-level, journey colors for page-level theming
tasks.action: Add a componentColors object that maps Figma's semantic color names to values: { brand: '#05AEDB', destructive: '#e11d48', gray: '#4b5563', success: '#7ab765', warning: '#f59e0b' }. Components reference componentColors for their Color prop; page-level wrappers apply journey theming separately.

sub_tasks.action: Add componentColors to colors.ts mapping Figma semantic names to hex values
Update Button, Badge, Tooltip, Icon Container to accept 'color' prop from componentColors
Keep journey theming as a higher-order wrapper (ThemeProvider) that overrides componentColors contextually

asset_export_pipeline.description: Complete Figma-to-codebase asset export plan. Each asset group lists what to download from Figma, the target path in the codebase, and the integration steps required after download.

asset_groups.name: Screen Illustrations (SVG)
asset_groups.description: 35+ custom illustrations across 18 screen sections. Currently ALL screens use IllustrationPlaceholder (gray boxes), IllustrationEmoji, or plain text. Zero real illustration assets exist in codebase.
asset_groups.source: Figma frames under Light Mode canvas

expected_files.name: error-no-internet.svg
expected_files.description: Hand holding phone with WiFi signal

expected_files.name: error-update-required.svg
expected_files.description: Character updating device with progress bar

expected_files.name: symptom-checker-body.svg
expected_files.description: Human body outline for symptom selection

post_download_steps: 1. Run SVGO optimization on all SVGs: npx svgo --folder src/web/design-system/src/assets/illustrations/ -r
2. Generate TypeScript registry (index.ts) with typed exports for each illustration
3. Replace IllustrationPlaceholder/IllustrationEmoji components with real or imports
4. Create responsive illustration wrapper component for consistent sizing across screen sizes

asset_groups.name: Strangeicons SVG Library (Health & Biology)
asset_groups.description: 111 Health & Biology icons cataloged from Figma, plus ~5700 more across 10 categories. Codebase has 37 hardcoded SVG paths. The iconRegistry.ts has been created with placeholder paths that need real SVG data from Figma.
asset_groups.source: Figma Icon Set page — strangeicons by Strange Helix (strangehelix.bio)
asset_groups.export_method: Figma REST API /v1/images with node IDs, format=svg
post_download_steps: 1. Export each icon node as SVG via /v1/images/:file_key?ids=NODE_ID&format=svg
2. Run SVGO to clean and optimize: npx svgo --folder src/web/design-system/src/assets/icons/ -r
3. Extract <path d='...'> data from each SVG and update iconRegistry.ts placeholder circles with real paths
4. Generate React Native compatible SVG components if needed for mobile: npx @svgr/cli --native src/web/design-system/src/assets/icons/
5. Update Icon.tsx to lazy-load icon SVGs by category for bundle size optimization

asset_groups.name: Plus Jakarta Sans Font Bundle
asset_groups.description: Font family used throughout the app. Mobile already has 4 TTF weights + Nunito-Bold. Web needs woff2 files for self-hosting (currently relies on external CDN or system font fallback).

missing_mobile_fonts.name: PlusJakartaSans-ExtraBold.ttf
missing_mobile_fonts.reason: Figma uses ExtraBold for display-xl (60px heading)

missing_mobile_fonts.name: PlusJakartaSans-Light.ttf
missing_mobile_fonts.reason: Figma uses Light for large body text in some cards

post_download_steps: 1. Option A (recommended): npm install @fontsource/plus-jakarta-sans in src/web/web/
2. Option B: Download woff2 files from Google Fonts and place in src/web/web/public/fonts/
3. Add @font-face declarations in global CSS or _app.tsx
4. Download ExtraBold and Light TTF variants for mobile: place in src/web/mobile/src/assets/fonts/
5. Update Expo useFonts in App.tsx to load new weights
6. Add font-display: swap for web performance

asset_groups.name: Logo & Brand Assets
asset_groups.description: Logo exists as basic raster PNG for mobile (logo.png). Missing: SVG logo for web, dark mode variant, horizontal/stacked variants, favicon SVG.
asset_groups.source: Figma — Logo component or brand guidelines page

needed_assets.name: logo-full.svg
needed_assets.description: Full Austa logo (icon + wordmark) in SVG for web, scalable

needed_assets.name: logo-icon.svg
needed_assets.description: Austa icon mark only (no text) in SVG

needed_assets.name: logo-full-dark.svg
needed_assets.description: Dark mode variant — white text on transparent

needed_assets.name: splash-screen.svg
needed_assets.description: Vector splash screen for both web and higher-quality mobile rendering

post_download_steps: 1. Export logo frames from Figma as SVG (find logo component node IDs)
2. Create src/web/design-system/src/assets/brand/ directory
3. Generate favicon.ico from SVG: npx svg-to-ico logo-icon.svg
4. Create Logo React component that renders SVG inline for theming support
5. Update mobile splash.png to higher resolution (@3x) if Figma has better source

asset_groups.name: Achievement Badge Assets
asset_groups.description: Achievement/gamification badges directory exists but contains only a README. Figma has achievement badge designs in the Achievements section. Lottie animations exist (achievement_unlocked.json, level_up.json) but no static badge images.
post_download_steps: 1. Export badge designs from Figma achievements section as SVG
2. Create src/web/design-system/src/assets/achievements/ directory
3. Update Leaderboard.styles.ts to reference badge SVGs instead of hardcoded gold/silver/bronze hex colors
4. Create AchievementBadge component that renders appropriate badge by tier

asset_groups.name: Notification & Sound Assets
asset_groups.description: Notification icon and sound assets exist but may not match Figma canonical designs. Verify against Figma and replace if divergent.
post_download_steps: 1. Compare notification-icon.png with Figma notification icon design
2. Export updated version if divergent
3. Sound assets are not in Figma — keep as-is unless UX specifies changes

phase_0_immediate.description: Assets that can be downloaded NOW without Figma API (no rate limit)
tasks: ASSET-003: Download ExtraBold + Light TTF from Google Fonts (mobile)

phase_1_figma_api.description: Assets requiring Figma REST API (blocked until rate limit resets)
tasks: ASSET-002: Export 111 Health & Biology icon SVGs via /v1/images API
ASSET-004: Export logo variants from Figma
ASSET-005: Export achievement badge designs from Figma
phase_1_figma_api.estimated_api_calls: ~200 total (18 section fetches + 111 icon exports + 30 illustration exports + logo/badge exports)
phase_1_figma_api.rate_limit_strategy: Batch 10 node IDs per /v1/images call (max supported), 1 request per second, estimated 20 minutes total

tasks: Run SVGO on all SVGs: npx svgo -r src/web/design-system/src/assets/
Generate TypeScript barrel exports (index.ts) for each asset directory
Extract icon SVG paths and update iconRegistry.ts
Create React Native SVG components via @svgr/cli for mobile
Update all screen components to import real assets instead of placeholders

component_updates.action: Import error-404-not-found.svg, replace plain text '404' with illustration
Import error-401-server.svg, replace inline SVG circle with illustration
Import splash-logo.svg, replace LogoContainer colored circle
Import error-empty-state.svg and error-no-internet.svg, replace IllustrationEmoji
Already refactored to use iconRegistry — update registry paths after SVG export
Import badge SVGs, replace hardcoded gold/silver/bronze hex colors

total_assets_to_export.fonts: 2 additional weights (ExtraBold, Light) for mobile + woff2 bundle for web

execution_order: Phase 1: Token fixes (TOK-001, TOK-002, TOK-008, TOK-010) — unblocks everything
Phase 2: Architecture alignment (ARCH-001, TOK-004, TOK-005, TOK-006) — enables component fixes
Phase 3: Icon system replacement (TOK-003) — can run in parallel with Phase 2
Phase 3b: Illustration export from Figma (ILL-001) — REQUIRES Cowork with Figma MCP, run in parallel
Phase 4: Component extensions (TOK-007, COMP-001 through COMP-008) — depends on Phase 1+2
Phase 5: Hardcoded value cleanup (HC-001 through HC-006) — depends on Phase 1
Phase 5b: Integrate exported illustrations into screen components — depends on Phase 3b
Phase 6: Accessibility sweep (A11Y-001, A11Y-002) — independent, can start anytime

COWORK_ONLY_illustration_export: ILL-001 (all sub-tasks) — requires Figma MCP, must run in Cowork
VS_CODE_illustration_integration: ILL-001 screen component updates — after assets are exported

two_environment_pipeline.cowork_tasks: All ASSET-* exports (illustration, icon, logo, badge SVGs via Figma MCP/API) + TOK-003 (strangeicons research via web)
two_environment_pipeline.vs_code_tasks: Everything else — token fixes, architecture, components, hardcoded cleanup, a11y, asset integration
